title: Wildfire alert for Gouna, Knysna
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Garden Route District Municipality firefighters have responded to a call for assistance regarding a prescribed burn that has become uncontrolled in Gouna, Knysna.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Garden Route District Municipality firefighters have responded to a call for assistance regarding a prescribed burn that has become uncontrolled in Gouna, Knysna."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Gouna is about 6km north of Knysna, 11km east of Rheenendal. Fire crews are currently en route to the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you spot a veld or wildfire, please report it immediately to the GRDM Emergency Call Centre at 044 805 5071 or via WhatsApp at 081 709 5193.","html":"If you spot a veld or wildfire, please report it immediately to the GRDM Emergency Call Centre at 044 805 5071 or via WhatsApp at 081 709 5193."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
